name: Basic Fruit Sauce
recipeInstructions: This fruit sauce is one of the basics. It can be served on ice cream or with a pastry. Combine first amount of juice, cream of tartar, sugar and lemon juice in a saucepan and bring to boil. Mix arrowroot with the rest of cold fruit juice. Add to boiling juice. Cook until clear and slightly thickened. Serve hot or cold. Makes 1 1/4 Cups
